codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit `2ce8b3a` against feature requirements and expected behavior. `scripts/quick-relaunch.sh` now provides explicit non-destructive handling for no-history (`quick-relaunch.sh:74-77`), no-longer-configured history (`79-82`), PATH-unavailable history (`84-87`), and launch failure recovery messaging (`89-91`), while still relaunching via `agent-launch.sh` with the caller pane path argument. `tests/quick-relaunch.sh` adds deterministic coverage for current-path semantics, no-history and stale-history no-launch branches, failure-to-recovery continuity, and cross-workspace relaunch context/state updates.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature-level regression scripts are still run ad hoc and are not captured as named commands in `.factory/services.yaml`, reducing discoverability and repeatability for future workers/validators.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff `/Users/ict/.factory/missions/b2de725d-ce67-46e3-a527-846396302b9f/handoffs/2026-04-08T05-56-12-324Z__quick-relaunch-history-and-recovery__a36cf3bb-b924-4fb1-b2c9-974ae1ccd51d.json` records direct runs of `tests/quick-relaunch.sh` and `tests/agent-picker.sh`, while `/Users/ict/.config/.factory/services.yaml` currently defines only `test` and `test_workspace_actions` under commands.

summary: Pass: implementation and test coverage match the quick-relaunch history/recovery contract, with no actionable code defects found in the reviewed diff.
